scope.project: Envision ESG single-report disclosure analysis MVP
scope.standard_reference: Official GRI consolidated English standards PDF
scope.baseline_rule: current_gap is based on the report's own GRI index; readiness_2026 and watchlist_2027 are future/readiness narratives and must not be mixed into 2024 gap scoring.
non_goals: This manifest does not contain full GRI clause text.
This manifest does not implement multi-company benchmarking.
This manifest does not implement public-opinion monitoring.

current_gap.definition: 2024 disclosure-gap analysis using Envision report's declared GRI index as the baseline scope.

readiness_2026.definition: Forward-looking readiness view for GRI requirements effective in 2026.

watchlist_2027.definition: Forward-looking watchlist for GRI requirements effective in 2027 or later.

disclosure_fields.manifest_item_id: Unique key for this manifest row.
disclosure_fields.standard_title_zh_or_en: Standard title retained in English unless a validated Chinese title is available.
disclosure_fields.standard_year: GRI standard publication/update year used for this row.
disclosure_fields.source_disclosure_id: Disclosure ID as written in the Envision report index; can differ from canonical ID when source table has confirmed typo.
disclosure_fields.canonical_disclosure_id: Normalized disclosure ID used by backend analysis.
disclosure_fields.report_index_pdf_page: PDF physical page where the GRI index row appears.
disclosure_fields.report_index_report_page: Printed report footer page where the GRI index row appears.

canonical_status_values.confirmed_from_report_index: Source and canonical IDs are aligned in the report index.
canonical_status_values.source_typo_confirmed: User manually confirmed a source-table ID typo; canonical ID is corrected and source ID is preserved.
canonical_status_values.requires_topic_instantiation: Generic placeholder; implementation must instantiate per material topic/topic standard.
canonical_status_values.future_standard_not_current_gap: Future/readiness standard; not a 2024 current disclosure gap.

schema.gri_3_3_handling: The generic 3-3 row is a scope marker only. Production analysis should instantiate GRI 3-3 per material topic or topic standard.

known_source_issues.description: User verified that 'Ratio of basic salary and remuneration of women to men' is written as 405-1 in the source table; canonical mapping is 405-2.
User verified that 'Negative social impacts in the supply chain and actions taken' is written as 414-1 in the source table; canonical mapping is 414-2.
